questions.question: The hit movie Tootsie was nominated for numerous awards, with Jessica Lange receiving the Best Actress Oscar. Who was the male lead?
What was invented by a Hungarian architect in 1974 to explain 3-D geometry but became a popular toy in the 80s?
What infectious song by Katrina and the Waves had a video of her dancing through London?
Who won the 1976 Olympic gold medal for the decathlon, and was popularly crowned "the world's greatest athlete"?
What cereal's slogan was "Kid tested; Mother approved."?
